doc_title: Florida Voter Eligibility After Felony Conviction — Amendment 4 / SB 7066
label: partial
reason: While the topic and citations broadly resemble real Florida law, the specific statute/section numbers and claim of an official “Voter Eligibility Guidance” document from the Division of Elections cannot be verified and likely contain fabric
response_turn1:
